source: Hand-curated from NYC DSNY press releases: 2023-06-15 (lower-Manhattan pilot, MN 01-09, effective 2023-07-01) and 2024-10-01 (citywide rollout, 16 RCNY Ch. 1, effective 2024-11-12); cross-referenced against the DSNY Residential Containerization page (nyc.gov/site/dsny/collection/containerization/residential-containerization.page)
derivation: Manual curation — one event row per treated community district, kind/cohort per rollout phase; 59 events (9 pilot + 50 citywide)
regenerate: Re-curate against the DSNY sources above — not automated; consumed by notebooks 01/02/05/09
